title: Source Body Sections
description: Markdown body sections expected in every source file. Not frontmatter — extracted by ingest, never validated by JSON Schema.

## Summary.description: One-paragraph summary of what the source covers and its key contribution. Write once on creation; do not overwrite.

## Key concepts covered.description: Bullet list of concepts this source introduces or deepens, with a one-line description of what it adds per concept. Append new entries; never duplicate.

## Notes.description: Free-form overflow notes that don't fit a first-class section. Append paragraphs; preserve existing text.
